criteria_results.criterion: ExportPdfDialogProps accepts an `availability` record mapping ExportConfig keys to booleans
criteria_results.evidence: Dialog renders with 4 sections visibly disabled (disabled=true, checked=false) and 8 enabled — confirms availability prop is being consumed and driving render behavior. If prop were absent/ignored all sections would be enabled.

criteria_results.criterion: SECTION_GROUPS `available` field is replaced with dynamic lookup from the availability prop
criteria_results.evidence: Disabled sections: Improvements (requires improvement ideas), Perspective Comparison (requires perspectives), Prioritization Matrix (requires prioritization scores), Tool Landscape (requires tools to be added). Static hardcoded `available:true` would not produce this differential result.

criteria_results.criterion: journeyMap/journeySentiment disabled when no journey tab exists
criteria_results.evidence: Journey Map and Journey Sentiment are checked:true/disabled:false. Workspace has a visible 'Journey' tab in the tab bar — correct behavior (enabled when journey tab exists).

criteria_results.criterion: improvements disabled when no improvement ideas
criteria_results.evidence: Improvements checkbox: disabled=true, checked=false. Tooltip in accessibility tree: 'Requires improvement ideas'. Workspace has no improvement ideas.
Perspective Comparison checkbox: disabled=true, checked=false. Tooltip: 'Requires perspectives'.
Tool Landscape checkbox: disabled=true, checked=false. Tooltip: 'Requires tools to be added'.

criteria_results.criterion: prioritizationMatrix disabled when no prioritization scores on steps
criteria_results.evidence: Prioritization Matrix checkbox: disabled=true, checked=false. Tooltip: 'Requires prioritization scores'.

criteria_results.criterion: canvasSnapshot, dataTable, gapAnalysis, costAnalysis, executiveSummary always available (core sections)
criteria_results.evidence: All 5 core sections confirmed checked:true, disabled:false in dialog eval: Canvas Snapshot, Data Table, Gap Analysis, Cost Analysis, Executive Summary.

criteria_results.criterion: Disabled sections show tooltip text (from disabledTooltip) on hover
criteria_results.evidence: Accessibility tree shows disabled section containers with title attributes: 'Requires improvement ideas', 'Requires perspectives', 'Requires prioritization scores', 'Requires tools to be added'.

criteria_results.criterion: Disabled sections are unchecked and cannot be toggled
criteria_results.evidence: All 4 disabled sections: disabled=true, checked=false. HTML disabled attribute prevents toggle interaction.

criteria_results.criterion: Preset configs only enable sections that are available — unavailable sections in a preset stay false
criteria_results.evidence: Clicked 'Full Audit' preset. All 4 disabled sections remained checked:false after preset applied. Available sections (8) all became checked:true. Masking confirmed working.

criteria_results.criterion: renderTableOfContents() handles overflow by calling pdf.addPage() and resetting y when entries exceed page height
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json: status=completed. Notes confirm 'break on y-overflow replaced with pdf.addPage() + dark background fill + y reset to margin + font reapplication'. No UI to test; static verification from build.

criteria_results.criterion: New tool section nodes created via Add Tool Section button are positioned with non-overlapping coordinates
criteria_results.evidence: Tools canvas page loaded cleanly at /w/.../tools. 'Add Tool Section' button present (ref=e120). BUILD_RESULT_3.json: fix uses nextSectionYRef (useRef<number>(0)) to synchronously record Y position before async createToolSection call, guaranteeing minimum 50px gap under rapid clicking. TypeScript passes.

bugs_found.description: AI Insights section is enabled (checked:true, disabled:false) despite OPENROUTER_API_KEY not being configured, meaning no AI analysis could have run and workspace.settings.last_analysis_at should be null. Expected: AI Insights disabled with tooltip 'Requires AI analysis'. Actual: AI Insights enabled and checked. Either the hasAiInsights check in canvas-view.tsx has a logic error, or workspace.settings is unexpectedly truthy.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /w/[workspaceId]/[tabId] on a workspace with no AI analysis run. 2. Click Export PDF. 3. Observe AI Insights checkbox — it is enabled when it should be disabled.

improvements_found.observation: When a preset (e.g. 'Full Audit') is applied and some sections are disabled, no visual indication tells the user why the preset didn't enable all expected sections. A user might not notice that Tool Landscape was supposed to be in Full Audit but wasn't enabled.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Show a small info note under the preset buttons when a preset was applied but some sections were masked, e.g. '3 sections unavailable — add data to unlock them'.
